en.extract:
The Madagascar spinetail, Madagascan spinetail  or Malagasy spinetail (Zoonavena grandidieri) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae.
It is found in Comoros, Madagascar, and Mayotte.

The '''Madagascar spinetail, Madagascan spinetail ''' or '''Malagasy spinetail''' ('''''Zoonavena grandidieri''''') is a species of [[Swift (bird)|swift]] in the family [[Apodidae]].
It is found in [[Comoros]], [[Madagascar]], and [[Mayotte]].<ref>[https://sp.yimg.com/xj/th?id=OIP.Me0f65444ec05ab581454bd245d0d4da6H0&pid=15.1&P=0&w=300&h=300] {{Webarchive|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160405042447/https://sp.yimg.com/xj/th?id=OIP.Me0f65444ec05ab581454bd245d0d4da6H0&pid=15.1&P=0&w=300&h=300 |date=2016-04-05 }}</ref>
